## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `ARCHITECTURE.md` updated (if routes, tables, dependencies, or env vars changed)
- [ ] PR is focused — one concern per PR
